__comment: Merge these hooks into ~/.claude/settings.json (user-level → fires for ALL Claude Code sessions) OR a project's .claude/settings.json. Adjust the path to wherever this package is installed (e.g. /root/packages/notify or /studio/packages/notify). Secrets are NOT here: bin/notify.mjs reads NOTIFY_WEBHOOK_URL/NOTIFY_TOKEN from the env or ~/.claude/notify.env, so this file is safe to commit. Set NOTIFY_ON_STOP=1 (env or notify.env) to also receive completion pings; without it the Stop hook is a silent no-op.
